column1: # KD-only packing queue for spare H100 memory on GPUs 2 and 3.
# Started manually with scheduler-compatible locks while the plain 8B/14B jobs
# are still running, to use spare H100 memory without duplicate ownership.

column4: bash -c 'test -e runs/pack_wave_thinking_8b.marker && .venv/bin/python scripts/analyze.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/report.py && .venv/bin/python scripts/capability_report.py && touch runs/pack_wave_report.marker'
